'''nabuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacetoxywortmannin|deacetoxywortmannin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacetoxywortmannin|deacetoxywortmannin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nabuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næbizith|næbizith]] || [[word:næbizij|næbizij]] || [[word:næbizish|næbizish]] || [[word:næbizi|næbizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nabubuzuth|nabubuzuth]] || [[word:nabubuzuj|nabubuzuj]] || [[word:nabubuzush|nabubuzush]] || [[word:nabubuzu|nabubuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabuzuth|nabuzuth]] || [[word:nabuzuj|nabuzuj]] || [[word:nabuzush|nabuzush]] || [[word:nabuzu|nabuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabufzuth|nabufzuth]] || [[word:nabufzuj|nabufzuj]] || [[word:nabufzush|nabufzush]] || [[word:nabufzuf|nabufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nabuzuthu|nabuzuthu]] || [[word:nabuzuju|nabuzuju]] || [[word:nabuzushu|nabuzushu]] || [[word:nabuzuku|nabuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nabuzuth|nabuzuth]] || [[word:nabuzuj|nabuzuj]] || [[word:nabuzush|nabuzush]] || [[word:nabuzu|nabuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nabuzuthul|nabuzuthul]] || [[word:nabuzujul|nabuzujul]] || [[word:nabuzushul|nabuzushul]] || [[word:nabuzukul|nabuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nabuzuthuthu|nabuzuthuthu]] || [[word:nabuzujuju|nabuzujuju]] || [[word:nabuzushushu|nabuzushushu]] || [[word:nabuzuku|nabuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nabuzuthun|nabuzuthun]] || [[word:nabuzujun|nabuzujun]] || [[word:nabuzushun|nabuzushun]] || [[word:nabuzukun|nabuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nabuzuthuoro|nabuzuthuoro]] || [[word:nabuzujuoro|nabuzujuoro]] || [[word:nabuzushuoro|nabuzushuoro]] || [[word:nabuzukuoro|nabuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
